exercises.audioScript: I would like to say thank you.

options: He would like to give his opinion.

dictationPassage.text: I would like to say thank you. She would like to share her idea. We would like to work on this project. Would you like to drink something? I would like to apologize.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: मैं धन्यवाद कहना चाहूँगा। वह अपना विचार साझा करना चाहेगी। हम इस project पर काम करना चाहेंगे। क्या तुम कुछ पीना चाहोगे? मैं माफी मांगना चाहूँगा।
